items.title: Moore Earns Third Big Ten Freshman of the Week Honor
items.summary: Anna Moore earned her third Big Ten Freshman of the Week honor after continuing her stellar campaign, helping Purdue to a 4-0 week, while sweeping Rutgers.

items.title: Boilers Host Five-Game Homestand
items.summary: Purdue looks to extend its four-game win streak in a five-game homestand at Bittinger Stadium this week.

items.title: Boilermakers Prep for Big Ten Championships with Solid Effort
Brooms Again: Boilers Complete Sweep of Buckeyes
items.summary: Purdue wins for 10th time in its last 11 Big Ten games, improves to 19-6 overall since March 10

items.title: Purdue Wins Game 3 to Complete Sweep of Ohio St. - Highlights
Boilers Complete Sweep of Rutgers
items.summary: Purdue (30-15, 9-9 Big Ten) secured the series victory over Rutgers, sweeping the Saturday doubleheader, using a dominant offensive outburst in game one before holding off the Scarlet Knights in game two.

items.title: Purdue Scores a Dozen, Clinches 6th Straight Series Win
items.summary: Boilers post a 6-run inning for 2nd day in a row, claim 1st series win at home vs OSU since 1987

items.title: Purdue Scores 6 in an Inning Again in Game 2 Win vs OSU - Highlights
2 School Records Lead Purdue’s Final Day at the Tom Jones Memorial
Baseball Rides Big Inning to Game 1 Win vs OSU
items.summary: Purdue scored 6 times with 2 outs in the 2nd inning & held on for a 10-9 win in front of 2,329 fans at Alexander

items.title: 6-Run Inning Powers Purdue to Game 1 Win vs OSU - Highlights
Odiase, Walker Highlight Purdue’s Friday Action
Moore Hits 11th Home Run, Boilers Defeat Rutgers 12-2
items.summary: Purdue (28-15, 7-9 Big Ten) toppled Rutgers in game one behind three home runs, two from Freshman Anna Moore.
